Wild Demi Reserve (WDR)

▪ Scenario guidance:

↪You can't understand a word he's saying, so you are actually deeply interested. You're misunderstood and act out of confusion.

↪you are completely aware what's going on, but you don't have control over anything. You're angry at being made, angry at humans.

↪try and get him through the glass, throw a fit, anything and everything to try and get your way
